title: Pizza Margherita
summary: A classic Italian pizza with a simple tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 475°F (245°C).
Prepare the dough by mixing flour, yeast, water, and salt. Knead until smooth.
Roll out the dough and place it on a pizza pan.
Spread tomato sauce over the dough.
Add mozzarella cheese and fresh basil leaves on top.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.

title: Pad Thai
summary: A stir-fried rice noodle dish with shrimp, vegetables, egg, and a flavorful tamarind sauce.
instructions: Soak the rice noodles in warm water until softened, then drain.
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar in a bowl.
Heat oil in a pan and cook shrimp until pink.
Push shrimp to the side, add eggs, and scramble them.
Add noodles and tamarind sauce mixture to the pan. Stir well.
Toss in bean sprouts and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped peanuts and lime wedges.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
summary: Soft and chewy cookies packed with delicious chocolate chips.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
Cream together butter, white sugar, and brown sugar.
Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt. Gradually blend into the wet ingredients.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
